title: Floating Box
description: A retro-styled HTML5 game where a neon box floats — use Space to thrust and arrows/A-D to steer. Collect points by touching colorful platforms.
author: Floating Box
controls: Space: thrust; ←/→ or A/D: move; P: pause
notes: Includes index.html, style.css, script.js — packaged for itch.io
